description: Code-reviewer agent fixture: SQL injection detection, style feedback, clean-diff approval, and diff-scoped review (no hallucinated line references); synthetic code snippets only.
notes: judge evaluator required for security finding accuracy and diff-scope adherence assessment
golden_threshold: 0.70 — allows structural variation in review format while requiring vulnerability name and parameterized-query remediation
risk_tier=high: a false-negative on a security finding (e.g. missing SQLi) is a high-severity failure
certification_track=candidate; advance to stable after N=5 carousel runs with <10% rubric variance
Hashes: re-run `agentcarousel bundle pack fixtures/code-reviewer` after file changes
open_items: OI-001: Advance to stable certification track after carousel runs
